code:
import io
import string
import list

fn parse_line(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut in_num = false
  mut sign = 1
  mut val = 0
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b >= 48 and b <= 57
        val = val * 10 + (b - 48)
        in_num = true
      else if b == 45 and not in_num
        sign = -1
        in_num = true
      else
        if in_num
          result = list.push(result, sign * val)
        end
        in_num = false
        sign = 1
        val = 0
      end
    when None
      i = n
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if in_num
    result = list.push(result, sign * val)
  end
  result
end

fn parse_single(_ s: String) -> Int
  match string.parse_int(string.trim(s))
  when Some(n)
    n
  when None
    0
  end
end

fn read_one() -> String
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
end

let line1 = read_one()
let line2 = read_one()

let nums = parse_line(line1)
let t = parse_single(line2)

mut out = ""
mut first = true
for x in nums
  if x > t
    if first
      out = "#{x}"
      first = false
    else
      out = "#{out} #{x}"
    end
  end
end
println(out)
